title: QAT + Architecture Exploration (Non-Record)
author: mattleonard16

data.description: Threads a training flag through CastedLinear -> CausalSelfAttention -> MLP -> Block -> GPT -> loss so evaluation uses unquantized weights while training uses fake quantization.
Adds fake_quantize_per_row() to simulate int8 per-row quantization during training with a straight-through estimator.

novel_contributions: Quantization-aware training with straight-through estimator to reduce post-quantization degradation
fake_quantize_per_row() to simulate int8 per-row quantization during training
Training/evaluation split where only the training forward pass is quantized
Exploration of future extensions including SEQUENCE parameter sharing, BitNet b1.58 ternary quantization, and NorMuon
